stage1_info: Primary tests automatically compare your result with the reference answer across multiple features (hash, rows, types).
stage1_missing_rows: Missing rows (in reference, not in yours)
stage1_order_fail: Data correct, but row order does not match
stage2_info: These tests are written manually by the task author to check logic, performance, or the use of specific operators.
empty_sql_error: Write a SQL query before submitting
order_matters_hint: This task requires sorted results. Row positions will be checked.
extra_rows_hint: These rows are in your answer, but not in the reference solution.
missing_rows_hint: These rows should be in the result, but your query did not return them.
previous_solutions_hint: Click on an attempt to see its code and details, or to delete it. You can also mass-delete solutions below.
empty_state_desc: This will open after you make at least one attempt to solve the task.
delete_incorrect_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete <span1>incorrect</span1> solutions for this task? <span2>ALL</span2> failed attempts will be deleted! This action is irreversible.
delete_correct_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete <span1>correct</span1> solutions for this task? <span2>ALL</span2> successful attempts will be deleted! This action is irreversible.
delete_single_incorrect_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this <span1>incorrect</span1> attempt? This action is irreversible.
delete_single_correct_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this <span1>correct</span1> attempt? This action is irreversible.
order_failed_desc: Your query returned the correct data, but it is sorted in the wrong order. Check the ORDER BY clause: you may have mixed up the sort direction (ASC/DESC) or columns.
rows_compare_info: The number of rows returned by the query is compared with the number of rows in the reference answer.
hash_compare_info: A hash is a unique digital signature of data. It is calculated from all rows in the result. If the hashes match, the data is absolutely identical. A mismatch means there are differences in the data (different values, extra or missing rows).
err_timeout_desc: Execution aborted due to timeout (5 sec).
err_syntax_desc: Postgres could not execute the query.
err_platform_desc: Unfortunately, the reference query failed. Please notify the administrator.
err_colcount_desc_more: Your query returns more columns than required.
err_colcount_desc_less: Your query returns fewer columns than required.
tooltip_diff: Shows the exact difference between the result and the reference. Extra rows — present in the result, but missing in the reference. Missing rows — present in the reference, but missing in the result.
verdict_failed_desc: Discrepancies found in data and/or rules
no_history_yet: No solutions yet. Submit your first query!
no_analysis_desc: Click 'Submit' to get a detailed breakdown of your solution.
author_solution_hint: Peek at the original solution if you are stuck or want to check yourself.
